title: Pan-Seared Red Snapper with Crispy Knots
description: A vegan twist on a seafood dish, featuring pan-seared red snapper and crispy vegan knots.

ingredients.name: Red snapper
ingredients.notes: Make sure to get a sustainable and vegan-friendly substitute.

ingredients.name: Vegan flour
ingredients.notes: Use a gluten-free flour if needed.

instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
2. Season the red snapper fillet with salt and pepper.
3. Add a small amount of oil to the pan and sear the red snapper for 3-4 minutes per side.
4. While the red snapper is cooking, heat some oil in a separate pan and cook the vegan knots until crispy.
5. Serve the pan-seared red snapper with crispy knots on the side.
6. Garnish with your favorite herbs or spices.
